//: compilerOptions.paths aliases `vue` → @vue/runtime-core for Volar/vue-tsc, whose generated virtual code imports from `vue` (vui-rs has no `vue` meta-package). Inert for plain tsc. vueCompilerOptions (read by Volar/vue-tsc only) enables strict template checking against the GlobalComponents augmentation in packages/vue/src/vui-elements.d.ts.
